settingsWindow.title: Settings
settingsWindow.labelContextMenu: Add "7ZPM - Smart Extract" to Windows context menu
settingsWindow.labelAutoClose: Auto-close window after successful context-menu extraction
settingsWindow.labelParallelHint: Number of concurrent 7z.exe processes. Higher values are faster but use more CPU.
settingsWindow.aboutDescription: A desktop tool that manages historical passwords and automatically tries to extract encrypted archives. Leverages the local 7z.exe with multi-factor smart ranking to find the correct password in the fewest attempts.
settingsWindow.aboutLicense: This software is open-sourced under the AGPL-3.0 license.
settingsWindow.statusContextMenuNotRegistered: Not registered — enabling context menu is recommended.
settingsWindow.statusContextMenuDifferentInstance: Not the same copy as the one running.
settingsWindow.statusAutoCloseOn: On — auto-close 1 second after successful extraction
settingsWindow.statusAutoCloseOff: Off — keep window open after extraction
settingsWindow.restartMessage:
The application needs to restart for the language change to take effect.
Restart now?

firstRun.title: First-time setup
firstRun.message7ZipNotFound: 7-Zip was not found. Please download and install it if you need it.
firstRun.hintSettingsLater: You can find these options in Settings later.

viewModel.log7ZipNotDetectedHint: 7-Zip not detected. Please set 7z.exe path in Settings.
viewModel.hintSelectPwsFile: Hint: Please select a password file generated by this program (pws.json), not another JSON file.
viewModel.log7ZipNotFound: 7z.exe not found. Please verify 7-Zip is installed.
viewModel.logExtractSuccessNoPassword: Archive not encrypted, extracted without password → {0}
viewModel.logExtractFailed: Extraction failed. Please check the output directory or disk space.
viewModel.logSuggestAddPassword: Tip: Click "Add Password" to save the correct password for future use
viewModel.statusAutoClosing: Extraction successful — window will close in 1 second
viewModel.logLastExtractNoPassword: Last extraction was without password; no password was used.
viewModel.logLastExtractPasswordMasked: Password used: *** (hidden in file log, visible only in app)
viewModel.logLastExtractAutoCloseHint: (This record is from the last auto-closed extraction. Disable auto-close to see the full process.)

services.cannotGetExePath: Unable to determine the current executable path
services.invalidFileUnrecognized: File "{0}" is not a valid password file (unrecognized content format).
services.invalidFileArrayNoEntries: File "{0}" is a JSON array but does not contain password entry structures. Please select a password file generated by this program.
services.invalidFileArrayParseFailed: File "{0}" is not a valid password file. The JSON array could not be parsed as password entries. Please verify the correct file is selected.
services.invalidFileJsonParseFailed: The JSON structure of file "{0}" could not be parsed. Please verify the correct file is selected.
services.invalidFileWrongFormat: File "{0}" is not a 7-Zip Password Manager password file. (Expected format identifier "{1}", found "{2}")
